issuesFound.title: Motion animation missing prefers-reduced-motion override on .hero-ctas .btn-primary:hover

issuesFound.title: Motion animation missing prefers-reduced-motion override on .product-card:hover
issuesFound.explanation: Product cards move upward with transform: translateY(-3px) on hover, and no reduced‑motion media query disables this motion.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation toggle does not update aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The mobileNav.toggle function (and the open/close helpers it calls) change the visibility of the mobile navigation drawer but never set or update aria‑expanded on the trigger button (`.nav-toggle`). Screen‑reader users cannot know whether the menu is open.
issuesFound.fix: In mobileNav.open and mobileNav.close add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')` or `'false'` respectively, and ensure the initial HTML has `aria‑expanded="false"` on the trigger.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation open does not set aria‑expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: mobileNav.open adds CSS classes and scroll‑lock but never updates the aria‑expanded state of the hamburger button.
issuesFound.fix: After opening, call `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')`.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation close does not clear aria‑expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: mobileNav.close removes CSS classes but does not set `aria-expanded="false"` on the trigger, leaving the state stale for assistive tech.
issuesFound.fix: Add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')` in the close routine.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu open does not update aria‑expanded on trigger button
issuesFound.explanation: _openInstance adds `hidden` to the panel and toggles CSS classes, but never sets `aria-expanded` on the associated trigger button, violating disclosure button requirements.
issuesFound.fix: After opening, call `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')`; on close set to `'false'`.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu trigger missing initial aria‑expanded attribute
issuesFound.explanation: When dropdowns are registered, the code ensures `aria-haspopup` and `aria-controls` but does not ensure an initial `aria-expanded="false"` on the trigger, so screen readers cannot infer the collapsed state on load.
issuesFound.fix: In dropdownMenu.register add `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')` if the attribute is absent.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion open does not set aria‑expanded on trigger button
issuesFound.explanation: faqAccordion.open sets internal state and animates the panel but never updates `aria-expanded` on the question button, breaking the ARIA accordion pattern.
issuesFound.fix: Add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')` when opening and `'false'` when closing.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion trigger missing initial aria‑expanded attribute
issuesFound.explanation: faqRegistry.parse creates the trigger and panel ARIA relationships but does not set an initial `aria-expanded` value, leaving the state undefined for assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix: After creating the trigger, set `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')` unless the item is pre‑opened.

issuesFound.title: Product filter count badge updates are not announced to AT
issuesFound.explanation: productFilter._updateCountBadge changes the numeric badge but does not provide an ARIA live announcement, so users cannot know how many products match the filter.
issuesFound.fix: Add `setAttr(_countBadge, 'aria-live', 'polite')` and update its `aria-label` or use `liveRegion.announce` after changing the count.

issuesFound.title: Pricing period toggle does not announce change via live region
issuesFound.explanation: pricing.setPeriod updates UI (prices, badges) but does not announce the new billing period to screen readers, leaving users unaware of the switch.
issuesFound.fix: After updating prices, call `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.pricingPeriodChanged || 'Billing period switched to ' + period)`.

issuesFound.title: Inline validator does not set aria‑invalid on invalid fields
issuesFound.explanation: inlineValidator.validate uses validationRules to determine validity but only adds CSS error classes; it never sets `aria-invalid="true"` on the field, so AT cannot detect the error state.
issuesFound.fix: In _inlineValidator._renderResult when result.valid is false, call `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true')`.

issuesFound.title: Inline validator does not clear aria‑invalid when field becomes valid
issuesFound.explanation: When a previously invalid field becomes valid, the validator removes error classes but does not remove or set `aria-invalid="false"`, leaving the error state persisted for AT.
issuesFound.fix: In _inlineValidator._renderResult when result.valid is true, call `removeAttr(field, 'aria-invalid')` or `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'false')`.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation trigger lacks initial aria‑expanded attribute on page load
issuesFound.explanation: The hamburger button (`.nav-toggle`) is not given an explicit `aria-expanded="false"` in the initial markup or initialization code, so its collapsed state is ambiguous to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: In mobileNav.init or directly in HTML, ensure `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')`.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu trigger lacks initial aria‑expanded attribute on page load
issuesFound.explanation: As with mobile navigation, dropdown trigger buttons start without `aria-expanded="false"`, making their collapsed state invisible to AT.
issuesFound.fix: Add `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')` during registration.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion panel visibility changes are not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: faqAccordion.open/close animate panels but only emit custom events; they do not provide an ARIA live announcement (e.g., “Answer expanded”).
issuesFound.fix: After opening or closing, call `liveRegion.announce(item.open ? 'Answer expanded' : 'Answer collapsed')`.

issuesFound.title: Pricing toggle button does not set aria‑pressed when switching billing period
issuesFound.explanation: The billing‑period toggle (`_toggleEl`) updates visual state but never updates `aria-pressed` to reflect the current period, violating the toggle button pattern.
issuesFound.fix: In _ onToggleClick or setPeriod, call `setAttr(_toggleEl, 'aria-pressed', period === 'year' ? 'true' : 'false')`.

issuesFound.title: Pricing period buttons lack aria‑pressed state updates
issuesFound.explanation: Each period button (`_periodBtns`) receives an active class but does not set `aria-pressed` to indicate the selected state.
issuesFound.fix: After changing period, iterate `_periodBtns` and set `setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', btn.getAttribute('data-period') === period ? 'true' : 'false')`.

issuesFound.title: Site search suggestion list does not have role="listbox" or aria‑activedescendant updates for keyboard navigation
issuesFound.explanation: The suggestion list is created with `role="listbox"` but the code never updates `aria-activedescendant` on the input when navigating with arrow keys, so screen readers cannot follow the highlighted suggestion.
issuesFound.fix: In siteSearch._onInputKeydown when changing _searchState.activeIndex, call `setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-activedescendant', suggestionListRenderer.getItemAt(index).id)`.

issuesFound.title: Product filter view‑mode toggle button does not have aria‑pressed state reflected
issuesFound.explanation: The view‑mode buttons toggle CSS classes but never set `aria-pressed` to indicate which mode is active.
issuesFound.fix: After toggling, call `setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', btn.getAttribute('data-view-mode') === newMode ? 'true' : 'false')` for each button.

issuesFound.title: File upload zone does not announce file‑added events via live region (only uses liveRegion.announce, which is fine) – but the status element lacks `aria-live="polite"` and is hidden, so announcements may be missed.
issuesFound.explanation: The _statusEl used for busy state is not given `aria-live`.
issuesFound.fix: Ensure `_statusEl.setAttribute('aria-live', 'polite')` when creating the zone.

issuesFound.title: Billing period toggle buttons missing aria‑pressed
issuesFound.explanation:
The monthly/annual buttons act as a binary toggle but lack aria‑pressed, so the selected state is not communicated to assistive tech.  
  Fix (both buttons):  
  ```tsx
  <button
    type="button"
    id="billing-monthly"
    className={...}
    onClick={() => onChange('monthly')}
    aria-pressed={value === 'monthly'}
  >
    Monthly
  </button>
  <button
    type="button"
    id="billing-annual"
    className={...}
    onClick={() => onChange('annual')}
    aria-pressed={value === 'annual'}
  ```

issuesFound.title: mobileNav toggle functions do not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The `mobileNav.open` and `mobileNav.close` functions toggle the visibility of the navigation drawer using CSS classes (`is-open`) and the `hidden` attribute, but they fail to update the `aria-expanded` state on the trigger button (`_trigger`). Screen reader users will not be informed whether the menu is currently open or closed.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 1676: function open(announceToSR) { ... setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true'); ... }
  Line 1696: function close(announceToSR) { ... setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false'); ... }

issuesFound.title: mobileNav initialisation does not set initial aria-expanded state
issuesFound.explanation: The `mobileNav.init` function sets up event listeners but does not initialise the `aria-expanded` attribute on the trigger button (`_trigger`) to `'false'` if the menu is closed by default. ARIA states must reflect the current state on page load, not just after interaction.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1756: function init() { ... if (_trigger) setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false'); ... }

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu toggle functions do not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The `dropdownMenu._openInstance` and `dropdownMenu._closeInstance` functions show and hide the dropdown panel but do not update the `aria-expanded` attribute on the trigger button (`inst.trigger`). This prevents assistive technology from tracking the open/closed state of the dropdown.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 1833: function _openInstance(inst) { ... setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true'); ... }
  Line 1846: function _closeInstance(inst, returnFocus) { ... setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false'); ... }

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu registration does not initialise aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The `dropdownMenu.register` function sets `aria-haspopup` and hides the panel but does not set the initial `aria-expanded="false"` on the trigger element. The ARIA state must be present in the DOM before the first user interaction.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1916: function register(trigger, panel) { ... setAttr(trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false'); ... }

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open function does not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The `faqAccordion.open` function adds the `is-open` class and removes the `hidden` attribute from the panel, but it fails to set `aria-expanded="true"` on the trigger button. The `close` function correctly sets it to `'false'`, creating an inconsistent state management pattern.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2733: function open(item, announceToSR) { ... setAttr(item.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true'); ... }

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markInvalid does not set aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: The `srUtils.markInvalid` utility function links the error message via `aria-describedby` but fails to set `aria-invalid="true"` on the invalid field. This attribute is required for assistive technologies to explicitly identify the field as having a validation error.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2373: function markInvalid(field, errorEl) { ... field.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'true'); addDescribedBy(field, errorEl); }

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markValid does not clear aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: The `srUtils.markValid` utility function removes the error description but does not clear the `aria-invalid` attribute (by setting it to `'false'` or removing it). The field may remain marked as invalid to assistive technology even after the error is resolved.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2393: function markValid(field, errorEl) { ... field.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'false'); ... }

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu toggle functions do not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdown menu controller opens and closes panels via _openInstance() and _closeInstance(), but neither function updates the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button (inst.trigger). This prevents screen reader users from knowing whether the dropdown menu is currently expanded or collapsed.

issuesFound.title: siteSearch toggle functions do not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The search suggestion combobox is controlled by _open() and _close() functions, but these functions do not toggle the aria-expanded attribute on the search input element (_inputEl). Screen readers cannot announce whether the suggestion list is expanded or collapsed.

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markInvalid does not set aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: When form validation fails, the markInvalid function only adds an aria-describedby reference to the error message element but fails to set aria-invalid="true" on the invalid field. Screen readers cannot programmatically identify the field as invalid.

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markValid does not clear aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: When a field becomes valid, the markValid function removes the error description from aria-describedby but does not clear the aria-invalid attribute to "false" or remove it, leaving the field incorrectly marked as invalid for screen reader users.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu aria-expanded not initialised at page load
issuesFound.explanation: When registering dropdown triggers, the code sets aria-haspopup and aria-controls but fails to initialise aria-expanded to "false" for closed dropdowns on page load, preventing screen readers from knowing the initial state.

issuesFound.title: siteSearch aria-expanded not initialised at page load
issuesFound.explanation: The search input is configured as a combobox but aria-expanded is not initialised to "false" when the page loads, preventing screen readers from knowing the initial collapsed state of the suggestion list.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav open/close actions not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile navigation opens or closes, no announcement is made to screen readers. Users navigating with keyboard shortcuts cannot tell that the navigation state has changed or whether the menu is now accessible.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu open/close actions not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: Opening or closing dropdown menus does not trigger a live region announcement, leaving screen reader users unaware that the dropdown content has appeared or disappeared, or whether their action was successful.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open/close actions not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: Expanding or collapsing FAQ items changes the visible content but does not announce the state change to screen readers, preventing users from knowing whether the accordion panel is now open or closed.

issuesFound.title: pricing billing period change not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: Switching between monthly and annual billing periods updates the prices visually but does not announce the change or the new billing period to screen reader users, leaving them unaware of the pricing update.

issuesFound.title: productFilter filter application not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: When filters are applied, the product grid updates and the count badge changes, but no announcement is made to inform screen reader users how many results are now showing or that the filter has been successfully applied.

issuesFound.title: siteSearch suggestion selection not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: When a user selects a suggestion from the search dropdown, the action proceeds but the selection is not announced to screen readers, leaving users uncertain whether their selection was registered before the page navigation occurs.

fpTitles: productFilter filter application not announced via live region

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu disclosure functions missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: These functions manage dropdown panel visibility using the hidden attribute and CSS classes, but they never synchronize the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button. Assistive technologies cannot announce the expanded or collapsed state of the dropdown menus.
issuesFound.fix:
Line (in _openInstance after `inst.open = true;`): `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');`
  Line (in _closeInstance after `if (!inst.open) return;`): `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: siteSearch combobox missing aria-expanded management

This prevents screen readers from announcing the visibility state of the suggestion list.

  Line (in _close after `_searchState.open = false;`): `setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: Form validation does not clear aria-invalid on valid fields

issuesFound.title: themeSwitcher non-native elements missing keyboard support
issuesFound.explanation: The theme switcher attaches a click listener to document for [data-theme-toggle] elements. If these elements are not native <button>s, they will not respond to Enter or Space keys. The code does not add keydown handlers for non-button elements.
